decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to quickly deploy artifact creatures and other artifacts onto the battlefield to take advantage of Affinity mechanics and flood the board with threats. The deck aims to ramp up mana with Mox Opal and Urza's Saga, while disrupting the opponent's game plan with counterspells like Metallic Rebuke. By utilizing artifacts like Engineered Explosives and Weapons Manufacturing, the deck can control the board and push through damage with aggressive creatures such as Pinnacle Emissary and Kappa Cannoneer.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures while utilizing blink effects to protect them and generate value. By combining aggressive threats with flicker effects like Ephemerate and Flickerwisp, the deck can disrupt opponents' plans and maintain board presence. With a mix of removal spells and hand disruption, it aims to control the game's tempo and pressure opponents early on. The deck's key strength lies in its ability to outpace opponents and overwhelm them with a steady stream of threats that are difficult to deal with efficiently.

This deck focuses on utilizing the combination of creatures and spells to create a powerful engine that can quickly overwhelm opponents. By using cards like Basking Broodscale, Glaring Fleshraker, and Kozilek's Command, the deck aims to control the board while building up a strong presence. Emrakul, the Promised End and Sephiroth, Fabled SOLDIER serve as finishers to close out the game. The deck also includes utility cards like Pithing Needle and Soul-Guide Lantern to disrupt opponents' strategies. Overall, the deck aims to generate value and outpace opponents through efficient creatures and spells.

The deck focuses on using cards like Street Wraith, Shardless Agent, and Living End to quickly fill the graveyard with creatures, then casting Living End to bring them all back onto the battlefield. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a large number of creatures and win the game in a single turn. The deck also includes disruptive spells like Force of Negation and Subtlety to protect the combo. The key strategy is to efficiently cycle through the deck and set up the Living End combo while disrupting the opponent's game plan.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressively attacking the opponent with creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Seasoned Pyromancer while using burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Galvanic Discharge to control the board. The deck also includes cards like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to increase consistency and resilience. The inclusion of Goblin Bombardment allows for additional reach and removal, while cards like Thraben Charm and Voice of Victory provide versatility in combat situations. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive game plan.

The key concept of the deck is to disrupt and control the opponent's resources through land destruction and removal spells. By using cards like Cleansing Wildfire, Field of Ruin, and Path to Exile, the deck aims to slow down the opponent's game plan while maintaining control of the board. Additionally, the deck utilizes cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Price of Freedom to further disrupt the opponent's strategy. With a mix of control elements and land destruction, the deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent in a Modern 1 vs 1 format.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with creatures and then using various reanimation spells to bring them back onto the battlefield for a powerful combo finish. It uses cards like Faithless Looting and Thoughtseize to both fill the graveyard and disrupt the opponent's hand, while also utilizing cards like Unearth and Persist to bring back key creatures like Archon of Cruelty. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and close out the game before they have a chance to recover.

The deck focuses on utilizing versatile creatures to assemble a lethal combo using cards like Yawgmoth, Thran Physician and Walking Ballista. Agatha's Soul Cauldron and Malevolent Rumble provide additional support and removal options, while Green Sun's Zenith allows for tutoring key creatures. The toolbox aspect of the deck is enhanced by cards like Endurance and Grist, the Hunger Tide, providing flexibility and disruption against various strategies. The mana base is optimized for consistency and resilience, with options like Boseiju, Who Endures and Underground Mortuary to support the combo game plan.

This deck focuses on generating mana quickly through spells like Desperate Ritual and Pyretic Ritual while also utilizing Ral, Monsoon Mage for additional spell recursion. The goal is to cast multiple spells in a turn to generate a large amount of mana and then either cast a lethal Past in Flames or use Wish to tutor for a key combo piece. With the help of cards like Wrenn's Resolve and Reckless Impulse, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with a storm of spells.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize UrzaTron lands to quickly ramp up mana and cast powerful colorless Eldrazi creatures, while simultaneously disrupting the opponent's game plan with control elements like counterspells and removal spells. The deck aims to control the board, stabilize with cards like Ugin, Karn, and All Is Dust, and then overwhelm the opponent with large threats like Thought-Knot Seer and Devourer of Destiny. The inclusion of Karn, the Great Creator allows for additional utility by searching for artifacts to further disrupt the opponent's strategy.

The main concept of this deck is to assemble a powerful combo using cards that do not require any lands to function effectively. The deck focuses on using cards like Lotus Bloom and Goblin Charbelcher to generate mana and deal damage, while also utilizing counter spells like Force of Negation and Disrupting Shoal to protect the combo pieces. The deck also includes various draw spells and utility cards to help dig for the necessary pieces and control the opponent's board. The goal is to quickly assemble the combo and overwhelm the opponent before they can react effectively.

The main focus of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly and aggressively disrupt the opponent while dealing consistent damage through the use of low-cost spells and creatures. The deck utilizes cards like Monastery Swiftspear and Dragon's Rage Channeler to apply pressure early on, with support from cards like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart for targeted removal. The deck also includes card draw and card selection to maintain consistency and adapt to different situations. Overall, the strategy revolves around being fast, efficient, and disruptive in order to overwhelm the opponent.

This Mardu Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creatures and burn spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent. It also includes a mix of removal spells and disruption to control the board and protect its creatures. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and relentless assault, utilizing cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah, Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, and Ocelot Pride to apply pressure early in the game. The inclusion of cards like Fatal Push, Thraben Charm, and Goblin Bombardment helps to maintain tempo and deal with opposing threats.

This deck focuses on quickly reanimating powerful creatures from the graveyard using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Faithful Mending. It also utilizes instant spells like Ephemerate and Prismatic Ending to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to create explosive turns by combining its instant reanimation with control elements to overwhelm the opponent and win the game quickly. The key strategy is to efficiently utilize graveyard resources and instant spells to set up powerful combos and outpace the opponent in a 1 vs 1 format.

This deck focuses on using efficient reanimation spells like Unearth and Persist to bring back powerful creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Emperor of Bones from the graveyard. The deck also includes disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to control the game and protect the combo. By blending efficient reanimation and disruption, this deck aims to quickly put together a powerful board presence and overwhelm the opponent before they can effectively respond.

This UW Control deck focuses on controlling the board and disrupting the opponent's game plan using a variety of counter spells, removal, and planeswalkers. The deck features powerful control tools such as Counterspell, Teferi, Time Raveler, and Jace, the Mind Sculptor to dominate the game. It also utilizes cards like Prismatic Ending and Supreme Verdict to deal with threats efficiently. The inclusion of Isochron Scepter with Orim's Chant allows for locking down the opponent's spells while setting up win conditions with cards like Monumental Henge and Teferi, Hero of Dominaria.
